summary: A highly poetic and enthusiastic description of the show with no specific technical details
review: The lone review gushes about the concert’s atmosphere, describing it as a luminous dance party that builds to a soaring crescendo. No concrete information is given about the recording source or sound quality, nor are any particular songs or performances singled out.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one highly abstract review with a glowing tone; lacking concrete details on performance or recording quality makes it difficult to assign a higher rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments about soundboard, audience mix, clarity, or any technical issues were provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer praises the overall vibe and crescendo but does not mention individual songs or set structure.
